projects.name: Im Share
projects.description: Im Share is a social media where users can share images with each other. This site was heavily inspired by Instagram and Pinterest, focusing on a clean UI with minimal features.

projects.name: IFernship
projects.description: A React Native application that centralizes internship search and divulgation through a sole interface for academic stakeholders.

projects.name: Nunes Sports
projects.description: Nunes Sports é um site de CRUD de produtos feito para uma empresa fictícia de mesmo nome.

projects.name: Eye Dropper
projects.description: Eye Dropper is a shader for Godot (using gdshader language) that allows performing color palette swapping in an intuitive way.

projects.name: Locker
projects.description: Locker is a plugin for Godot that provides a quick and scalable way to save and load data using different strategies, with JSON and encryption out of the box.

projects.name: Terra's Terrarium
projects.description: This project is a platform game inspired by Bubble Bobble made for the Global Game Jam 2025.

projects.name: The Ice Moon
projects.description: A game about the an icy moon and a hot sun.

projects.name: Pong +
projects.description: A local 2 player competitive remake of the original Atari's Pong game.

projects.name: Chessey
projects.description: Jogo de xadrez em linha de comando desenvolvido em C.

projects.name: Agora
projects.description: Agora is a little todo list app made in React Native for practicing its main basic features.

projects.name: Pokedéx
projects.description: This project is a reimagination of a pokedex that provides info about pokemon with the pokeapi.

projects.name: Imagine Engine
projects.description: An engine for making 2D games with Java.

projects.name: Poké-Loopis
projects.description: Jogo de browser no estilo "Adivinhe o Pokémon" feito como parte de processo seletivo para ingressão na empresa Loopis Júnior.

projects.name: Dash Delivery
projects.description: A game about an 80s food delivery.

projects.name: ReciclAE Website
projects.description: Implementação do frontend web do aplicativo de reciclagem ReciclaAE.
